sources.notes: Statement has fixed inputs n in {5,1001}, disabled hacks, and requires printing a large induced cycle.
Official editorial/comments describe constructive pattern and search-assisted gadget ideas.
Accepted implementation used as a sanity check for the output-only geometric construction style.

annotation.summary: Excluded from the searchable ICPC-style problem set: fixed-input output-only construction problem.
annotation.constraints: Only two inputs exist, hacks are disabled, and the output is a large grid pattern rather than a normal algorithm over arbitrary tests.
annotation.core_idea: Although rated on Codeforces, this problem is closer to a fixed-output/geometric construction challenge than a reusable ICPC-style algorithmic problem. Keeping it in normal tag search would pollute high-rating constructive/geometry queries, so it is recorded as excluded while preserving sources and rationale.
annotation.complexity: Excluded; no normal reusable per-test algorithm is recorded.
